User runs a daily SITC payout watcher monitor. True economic P&L is better than -48.7% shown.

scorecard_deterministic.basis: cheap but downtrending — do NOT add to a falling knife; hold small, buy only once 200d reclaims OR a dated catalyst confirms

subscores.growth: SHRINKING (rev -70%) — expected for a liquidating REIT selling its assets

special_situation: This is a LIQUIDATION/special-distribution play, not a going concern. Revenue shrinkage is by design (asset sales). The investment case = remaining NAV per share vs price. Key question: what are remaining assets worth net of debt, and when is the next distribution? Today's +12.3% move suggests a payout/asset-sale announcement — VERIFY via web_fetch.
